zh.Nocton, Lincolnshire, England: 英國林可爾史爾諾可頓
zh.Cleveland, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾克利夫蘭

zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Darcy於1353年出生在英國越可爾時，她的父親John Darcy31歲，母親Elizabeth Meinill22歲。她於1369年與John Colville在英國越可爾阿可利福結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1405年8月20日在英國達勒姆享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Darcy于1353年出生在英国越可爾时，她的父亲John Darcy31岁，母亲Elizabeth Meinill22岁。她于1369年与John Colville在英国越可爾阿可利福结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1405年8月20日在英国達勒姆享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Darcy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Brendan, Eamonn, Maeve, Malachy, Niamh, Seamus.  French Gisele, Julien, Normand, Alain, Armand, Cecile, Clemence, Dominique, Emile, Gilles, Jean-Paul, Laure.
English (Lancashire) and Irish: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Arcy in Manche, France, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’.

Irish: in Ireland, this is generally the Norman name (see 1 above), established in Meath by Sir William D'Arcy in the 1360s, but it was also adopted for Ó Dorchaidhe ‘descendant of the dark one’, from dorcha ‘dark, gloomy’, a Connacht name that fell together with the Norman surname, which was introduced by Sir William D'Arcy and Sir John D'Arcy, Chief Justiciar of Ireland in the 14th century.

variants.name: Darcey
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and Irish (Tipperary): variant of   Darcy  .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Darcy was born in 1353, in Yorkshire, England, her father, John Darcy, was 31 and her mother, Elizabeth Meinill, was 22. She married John Colville in 1369, in Arncliffe, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 20 August 1405, in Durham, England, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Darcy est née en 1353, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, John Darcy, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Meinill, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé John Colville en 1369, à Arncliffe, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 août 1405, à Durham, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Darcy 1353 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Darcy 31 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Meinill 22. Sie hat 1369 in Arncliffe, Yorkshire, England John Colville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. August 1405 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Durham, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Darcy è nata il nel 1353 nel Yorkshire, England, sua padre, John Darcy, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Meinill, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato John Colville nel 1369, nel Arncliffe, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 20 agosto 1405, nel Durham, England, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Darcyが1353年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Darcyは31歳，母Elizabeth Meinillは22歳であった。1369年にイギリスヨークシュアイアアルンクリフでJohn Colvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1405年8月20日にイギリスダルハムで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Darcy(이)가 1353년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Darcy(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Meinill(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1369년 영국 요르크실르 아클리프에서 John Colville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1405년 8월 20일 영국 뒤람에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Darcy nasceu em 1353, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Darcy, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Meinill, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com John Colville em 1369, em Arncliffe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de agosto de 1405, em Durham, Inglaterra, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Darcy родилась в 1353 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Darcy было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Meinill, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Colville в 1369 г. в местности арнклифф, еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 20 августа 1405 г. в местности дурам, Англия в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Darcy nació en 1353, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Darcy, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Meinill, tenía 22 años. Se casó con John Colville en 1369, en Arncliffe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 20 de agosto de 1405, en Durham, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años.
